sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114047" key="ximetlia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῐμετλ-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n114047.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have chilblains,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
